mapper.sql: A.SEQ, A.REPLY_SEQ, A.REPLY_CONTENTS, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DCREATE_DT ,TO_CHAR( A.DCREATE_DT , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MM:SS') AS SCREATE_DT , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

, B.SUSER_NM AS SCREATE_NM ,(CASE WHEN STRPOS( B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(B.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) END ) AS SCREATE_EMAIL , C.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM , (CASE WHEN STRPOS( C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@') >4 THEN SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ))-2 ) || '***@' || SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) ELSE SUBSTRING (SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 ),0 , LENGTH(SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,1 )) ) || '*@' || SPLIT_PART(C.SUSER_EMAIL_ADR, '@' ,2 ) END ) AS SMODIFY_EMAIL
AND A.SCREATE_ID = B.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = C.SUSER_ID(+)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_BOARD_REPLY A
ORDER BY A.DCREATE_DT DESC
